message:
fix(web): eliminate mobile scroll flickering via Lenis disable and backdrop-filter removal

This commit addresses the pervasive scroll flickering issue on mobile/touch
devices by implementing a multi-pronged approach:

## ScrollProvider.tsx
- Add `isLikelyTouchDevice()` helper that properly detects touch devices by
  checking for (pointer: coarse) AND (hover: none) media queries, which
  reliably identifies iOS/iPadOS/Android devices
- Disable Lenis smooth scrolling entirely on touch devices - the native
  iOS momentum scrolling conflicts with Lenis's custom scroll handling,
  causing the viewport to fight between two scroll systems
- Add `cleanupLenisDomState()` to remove leftover Lenis CSS classes from
  html/body when disabling, preventing stale state from affecting styling
- Extract Lenis class names to constant array for maintainability
- Use stable empty object reference for default options to prevent
  unnecessary effect re-runs

## createWebStore.ts
- Add `getDefaultBackgroundEffects()` that returns false for touch devices
  detected via (hover: none) and (pointer: coarse) media queries
- This disables animated background effects by default on mobile, which
  were contributing to GPU overdraw and scroll jank
- Users can still re-enable in Settings if their device handles it well
- Migration logic updated to respect the new dynamic default

## holographic.css
- Expand the mobile backdrop-filter disable list to include ALL elements
  that use glassmorphism effects: .panel, .detail-card, .sequence-block,
  .btn, .badge, and the existing overlay/modal elements
- Split the rule into two parts: one to disable filters, one to add solid
  fallback backgrounds for overlay surfaces
- This prevents the GPU-intensive blur effects from running during scroll
  on mobile WebKit, which was a major source of the flickering

## BottomSheet.tsx
- Fix snap point calculation by adding `getTranslatePercentForSnapPoint()`
  that properly converts viewport-% heights to sheet-% translate values
- The previous calculation was incorrect because translateY percentages
  are relative to the element's own height, not the viewport
- Fix initial spring values to use the correct snap point calculations,
  preventing the sheet from animating from the wrong position on mount
- Update drag gesture to properly convert viewport drag distance to
  sheet-relative percentages using the maxHeight ratio
- Fix backdrop opacity calculation to use visible viewport percentage

The combination of these changes eliminates the scroll flickering that was
particularly severe on iOS Safari and Mobile Chrome, while maintaining the
premium visual effects on desktop browsers that can handle them.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -407,7 +407,14 @@
    ============================================================================= */
 
 @media (hover: none) and (pointer: coarse) {
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .panel,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .detail-card,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .sequence-block,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .btn,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .badge,
   [data-theme="holographic"] .glass-panel,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .app-header,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .db-status-bar,
   [data-theme="holographic"] .overlay-content,
   [data-theme="holographic"] .modal-content,
   [data-theme="holographic"] .command-palette,
@@ -417,7 +424,19 @@
   [data-theme="holographic"] .app-footer {
     backdrop-filter: none !important;
     -webkit-backdrop-filter: none !important;
-    /* Use solid backgrounds instead */
+  }
+
+  /* Fixed/sticky/overlay surfaces: switch to a solid background when blur is disabled. */
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .glass-panel,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .app-header,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .db-status-bar,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .overlay-content,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .modal-content,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .command-palette,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .toast,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .context-menu,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .control-deck,
+  [data-theme="holographic"] .app-footer {
     background: rgba(3, 0, 20, 0.95) !important;
   }
 }
